name: Anti-Mage
description: They who live by the wand shall die by my blade.

15.right: +9% Persecutor Min Slow +18% Persecutor Max Slow

abilities.name: Persecutor
abilities.description: The anti-arcanist applies a movement speed slow based on the affected enemy unit's current mana missing. The higher Anti-Mage's level, the greater the applied movement speed slow. Min Current Mana Threshold: 50%. Max Current Mana Threshold: 0%. Min Move Speed Slow: 12% (21%). Max Move Speed Slow: 24% (42%). Duration: 0.75. Min Move Speed Slow Increase: 0.5%.

abilities.name: Mana Break
abilities.description: The first attack after Blink applies an on-hit undispellable debuff on the first attacked enemy unit that prevents all mana restore and mana regeneration. The first successful hit after Anti-Mage Blinks additionally deals a bonus max mana as mana burn. Mana Burn per Hit: 25/30/35/40. Max Mana Burn per Hit: 1.6%/2.4%/3.2%/4% (3.1%/3.9%/4.7%/5.5%). Mana Burn to Damage Factor: 0.6. Mana Burn Factor: 0.25. Number of Targets: (1). Set Mana Regen: (0).

abilities.name: Blink
abilities.description: Grants Anti-Mage a buff upon cast. The first attack after Blink applies an on-hit undispellable debuff on the first attacked enemy unit that prevents all mana restore and mana regeneration. Max Blink Distance: 875/950/1025/1100 (1025/1100/1175/1250). Buff Duration: (5). Cooldown: 10.5/9/7.5/6 (9.5/8/6.5/5). Mana Cost: 65/60/55/50.

abilities.name: Counterspell
abilities.description: Passively grants Anti-Mage bonus magic resistance. Creates a blinked fragment of Anti-Mage next to the enemy caster upon reflecting their unit-targeted spell while active. Duration: 1.3. Magic Resist Bonus: 14%/21%/28%/35%. Number of Illusions per Proc: (1). Damage Dealt: (100%). Damage Taken: (200%) Duration: Damage Taken: (200%). Cooldown: 15/11/7/3. Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Mana Void
abilities.description: Deals damage within the radius, based on per point of missing mana of the unit-targeted enemy. Stuns the primary unit-targeted enemy for a short duration. Cast Range: 600. Effect Radius: 500 (700). Damage Factor per Missing Mana: 1 (1.5). Stun Duration: 0.3 (1.1). Cooldown: 100/85/70 (50/35/20). Mana Cost: 100/150/200.
